tests.source_program:
define i1 @test(i32 %0, ptr writeonly captures(none) initializes((0, 4)) %p) local_unnamed_addr #0 {
common.ret1:
  %.lobit = lshr i32 %0, 31
  %1 = trunc nuw i32 %.lobit to i1
  %2 = icmp slt i32 %0, 0
  %not. = xor i1 %1, true
  %common.ret1.op = select i1 %not., i1 %2, i1 false
  store i32 %.lobit, ptr %p, align 1
  ret i1 %common.ret1.op
}

  %1 = trunc nuw i32 %.lobit to i1
  %2 = icmp slt i32 %0, 0
  %not. = xor i1 %1, true

  store i32 %.lobit, ptr %p, align 1
  ret i1 %common.ret1.op
}

issue.title: Missed optimization: (xor (lshr i32 %0, 31), true) ? (%0 < 0) : false ==> false
issue.body:
The following reduced IR is derived from https://github.com/boostorg/geometry/blob/d2e5137f4070d8bbcd8ab150ad4fe42713c8ceb3/include/boost/geometry/algorithms/correct_closure.hpp#L56

Godbolt: https://godbolt.org/z/oW5b74jc4
alive2 proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/QHnD7e

```llvm
define i1 @src(i32 %0, ptr writeonly captures(none) initializes((0, 4)) %p) local_unnamed_addr #0 {
common.ret1:
  %.lobit = lshr i32 %0, 31
  %1 = trunc nuw i32 %.lobit to i1
  %2 = icmp slt i32 %0, 0
  %not. = xor i1 %1, true
  %common.ret1.op = select i1 %not., i1 %2, i1 false
  store i32 %.lobit, ptr %p, align 1
  ret i1 %common.ret1.op
}
```

expected:
```llvm
define i1 @tgt(i32 %0, ptr writeonly captures(none) initializes((0, 1)) %p) local_unnamed_addr #0 {
common.ret1:
  %.lobit = lshr i32 %0, 31
  store i32 %.lobit, ptr %p, align 1
  ret i1 false
}
```

opt-trunk -O3 generates:
```llvm
define i1 @src(i32 %0, ptr writeonly captures(none) initializes((0, 4)) %p) local_unnamed_addr #0 {
common.ret1:
  %.lobit = lshr i32 %0, 31
  %1 = trunc nuw i32 %.lobit to i1
  %2 = icmp slt i32 %0, 0
  %not. = xor i1 %1, true
  %common.ret1.op = select i1 %not., i1 %2, i1 false
  store i32 %.lobit, ptr %p, align 1
  ret i1 %common.ret1.op
}
```
issue.author: GINN-Imp

comments.author: RKSimon
comments.body:
instcombine should already convert the lshr+trunc to icmp_slt:
```
----------------------------------------
define i1 @src(i32 %a0) {
#0:
  %s = lshr i32 %a0, 31
  %t = trunc nuw i32 %s to i1
  ret i1 %t
}
=>
define i1 @src(i32 %a0) nofree willreturn memory(none) {
#0:
  %t = icmp slt i32 %a0, 0
  ret i1 %t
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
```
We just need to work out whats stopping it

comments.author: RKSimon
RKSimon
mayanksolanki393

tests.test_body:
define i32 @not_d_allSignBits(i32 %cond, i32 %tval, i32 %fval) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @not_d_allSignBits(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DOTNOT2:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[COND:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = xor i32 [[FVAL:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL:%.*]] = select i1 [[DOTNOT2]], i32 [[TVAL:%.*]], i32 [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[SEL]]
  %bitmask = ashr i32 %cond, 31
  %a1 = and i32 %tval, %bitmask
  %or = or i32 %bitmask, %fval
  %a2 = xor i32 %or, -1
  %sel = or i32 %a1, %a2
  ret i32 %sel
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @not_d_allSignBits(i32 %cond, i32 %tval, i32 %fval) {
  %bitmask = ashr i32 %cond, 31
  %a1 = and i32 %tval, %bitmask
  %or = or i32 %bitmask, %fval
  %a2 = xor i32 %or, -1
  %sel = or i32 %a1, %a2
  ret i32 %sel
}

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i16> @bitcast_vec_cond_commute3(<4 x i8> %cond, <2 x i16> %pc, <2 x i16> %pd) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @bitcast_vec_cond_commute3(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C:%.*]] = mul <2 x i16> [[PC:%.*]], [[PC]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = mul <2 x i16> [[PD:%.*]], [[PD]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DOTNOT2:%.*]] = icmp slt <4 x i8> [[COND:%.*]], zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = bitcast <2 x i16> [[D]] to <4 x i8>
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = bitcast <2 x i16> [[C]] to <4 x i8>
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP3:%.*]] = select <4 x i1> [[DOTNOT2]], <4 x i8> [[TMP1]], <4 x i8> [[TMP2]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = bitcast <4 x i8> [[TMP3]] to <2 x i16>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i16> [[R]]
  %c = mul <2 x i16> %pc, %pc
  %d = mul <2 x i16> %pd, %pd
  %s = ashr <4 x i8> %cond, splat (i8 7)
  %t9 = bitcast <4 x i8> %s to <2 x i16>
  %nott9 = xor <2 x i16> %t9, splat (i16 -1)
  %t11 = and <2 x i16> %c, %nott9
  %t12 = and <2 x i16> %d, %t9
  %r = or <2 x i16> %t11, %t12
  ret <2 x i16> %r
}
tests.source_program:
define <2 x i16> @bitcast_vec_cond_commute3(<4 x i8> %cond, <2 x i16> %pc, <2 x i16> %pd) {
  %c = mul <2 x i16> %pc, %pc
  %d = mul <2 x i16> %pd, %pd
  %s = ashr <4 x i8> %cond, splat (i8 7)
  %t9 = bitcast <4 x i8> %s to <2 x i16>
  %nott9 = xor <2 x i16> %t9, splat (i16 -1)
  %t11 = and <2 x i16> %c, %nott9
  %t12 = and <2 x i16> %d, %t9
  %r = or <2 x i16> %t11, %t12
  ret <2 x i16> %r
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define <2 x i16> @bitcast_vec_cond_commute3(<4 x i8> %cond, <2 x i16> %pc, <2 x i16> %pd) {
  %c = mul <2 x i16> %pc, %pc
  %d = mul <2 x i16> %pd, %pd
  %1 = bitcast <2 x i16> %d to <4 x i8>
  %2 = bitcast <2 x i16> %c to <4 x i8>
  %.not2 = icmp slt <4 x i8> %cond, zeroinitializer
  %3 = select <4 x i1> %.not2, <4 x i8> %1, <4 x i8> %2
  %r = bitcast <4 x i8> %3 to <2 x i16>
  ret <2 x i16> %r
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define <2 x i16> @bitcast_vec_cond_commute3(<4 x i8> %cond, <2 x i16> %pc, <2 x i16> %pd) {
  %c = mul <2 x i16> %pc, %pc
  %d = mul <2 x i16> %pd, %pd
  %1 = icmp slt <4 x i8> %cond, zeroinitializer
  %2 = bitcast <2 x i16> %d to <4 x i8>
  %3 = bitcast <2 x i16> %c to <4 x i8>
  %4 = select <4 x i1> %1, <4 x i8> %2, <4 x i8> %3
  %r = bitcast <4 x i8> %4 to <2 x i16>
  ret <2 x i16> %r
}

define <2 x i1> @not_d_bools_vector_poison(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i1> %x, <2 x i1> %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @not_d_bools_vector_poison(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = xor <2 x i1> [[Y:%.*]], splat (i1 true)
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[C:%.*]], <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i1> [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i1> [[R]]
  %y_c = or <2 x i1> %y, %c
  %and2 = xor <2 x i1> %y_c, <i1 poison, i1 true>

  %r = or <2 x i1> %and1, %and2
  ret <2 x i1> %r
}
